characters.name: Dragon
characters.description: DragonBiographyNicknamesLizard Lips (Jane)Green Lips (Jane)Big Newt (Jane)Froggy (Jane)GenderMaleAgeAbout 300 YearsRaceDragonStatusAliveResidenceCave above Kippernia CastleBackground InformationFirst EpisodeTests and JestsLast EpisodeFor Crying Out LoudVoice ActorAdrian TrussDragonisJane's best friend. He enjoys toilet humor, burning things, teasing Jane and her friends, lazing about the castle, and having adventures. Green Lips (Jane)Big Newt (Jane)Froggy (Jane) Despite being a few centuries old, Dragon has a very childlike and innocent personality, and is extremely friendly. However, he can be very protective and quick to anger if he thinks his friends, especially Jane, are threatened. Dragon is also very sensitive, being visibly hurt when Jane offends or upsets him. Grumpy, brave, and a bit silent; later, kind, caring, good, gentle, louder, childlike, friendly, innocent, protective, talented, sensitive, big-hearted
characters.personality_section: Grumpy, brave, and a bit silent; later, kind, caring, good, gentle, louder, childlike, friendly, innocent, protective, talented, sensitive, big-hearted

characters.name: Gunther
characters.description: Gunther BreechBiographyGenderMaleAge14ProfessionKnight's SquireFactionKippernium KingdomResidenceKippernook CastleBackground InformationFirst EpisodeTests and JestsLast EpisodeFor Crying Out LoudVoice ActorNoah ReidGunther Breech is Jane's fellow squire and rival in training. He is constantly pitted against Jane in his knight's training, and for this reason the two have developed somewhat of a rivalry. Gunther is a young boy with medium length black hair that is slicked back and grey eyes. Gunther is always seen wearing his grey knight's tunic, as well as armour on top of it. Gunther is known to be a bit stuck up, haughty and usually lazy. He is extremely ambitious and wants to be a knight just as badly as Jane and due to that fact, they have a rivalry going on to see who is better. Despite this rivalry, Gunther does have an interesting kind of friendship with Jane and, as the series progresses, becomes more trusting and accepting of Jane as his fellow squire. Gunther is known to be a bit stuck up, haughty and usually lazy. He is extremely ambitious and wants to be a knight just as badly as Jane and due to that fact, they have a rivalry going on to see who is better. Despite this rivalry, Gunther does have an interesting kind of friendship with Jane and, as the series progresses, becomes more trusting and accepting of Jane as his fellow squire. He is not very close to most of the other staff and is rarely seen hanging out with them. In "Mismatched" he does talk to the staff more often, particularly when they tease him for supposedly courting Jane. He has a rather interesting relationship with his father, Magnus Breech. Gunther wants to please his father and make him proud. Magnus cares for his son in a twisted way that causes Gunther to help cause mischief around the castle. Gunther always has a change of heart at the end of the day and does the right thing, much to his father's disappointment.

characters.name: Jane Turnkey
characters.description: Jane TurnkeyBiographyNicknamesCoppertop (Dragon)Shortlife (Dragon)Legs (Human Friends)Petal (Pepper)Lady in WaitingGenderFemaleAge12 years oldRaceHumanProfessionKnight's ApprenticeFactionKippernium KingdomStatusAlive.ResidenceKippernia CastleBackground InformationFirst EpisodeTests and JestsLast EpisodeFor Crying Out LoudVoice ActorTajja IsenMotion-Captured byAngela Green Shortlife (Dragon)Legs (Human Friends)Petal (Pepper)Lady in Waiting Jane Turnkeyis the daughter of the King Caradoc's chamberlain and Queen Gwendolyn's lady-in-waiting. She was brought up to be a lady-in-waiting to Princess Lavinia, but Jane shuns her designated fate and had always wanted to become a knight. Jane is a bright girl with a great deal of courage and honour combined with a bold persona. She is very ambitious, and her dream is to become the greatest knight in the kingdom she resides in. She is a bit tomboyish as well as kind and forgiving. Jane is also known for her stubbornness and sometimes reckless and thoughtless actions. Jane is a free-spirited preteen who's determined to become a knight. Despite her young age, she is highly courageous and brave, a good example of this being when she finds Princess Lavinia in a maze at night and goes to shield her from any wolves that were roaming the area. Even before the start of the series, she's shown to be quite brazen as when Dragon was first seen near the castle and took the prince, everyone else was panicking while she went up to his cave alone to slay him, not being aware what danger she could have been getting into. Thankfully, this event is what lead her to befriending Dragon and approvedly set her on the path of becoming a knight. She's also quite caring and goes out of her way to help her friends out whenever she can, such as when Jester accidentally got himself into a duel with Sir Ivon after crudely imitating him. Jane offers to train him and later tries to get him to run away in order to prevent him from seriously getting hurt, but becomes frustrated when he declines her attempts to help, thinking he's not taking the situation severely. This in turn shows she can sometimes lack faith in her friends' abilities or sense of judgement. Despite this, Jane is shown to acknowledge when she's wrong as she apologizes to Jester after his duel for not believing in him.

characters.name: Jester
characters.description: JesterBiographyNicknamesFloppy Hat (Dragon)Jingle Boy (Dragon)GenderMaleAge14 YearsRaceHumanProfessionCourt JesterFactionKippernium KingdomStatusAliveResidenceKippernia CastleBackground InformationFirst EpisodeTests and JestsLast EpisodeFor Crying Out LoudVoice ActorMark Rendall Jingle Boy (Dragon) Jester is the court jester. Like a lot of young men in The Middle Ages, Jester was renamed after his profession. Although his real name is never revealed, Jester does however know it and keeps it a secret.Guntherthinks it must be embarrassing. Jester is clever, funny and skilled in all art forms. He is also very kind and compassionate.

characters.name: Jester
characters.description: JesterBiographyNicknamesFloppy Hat (Dragon)Jingle Boy (Dragon)GenderMaleAge14 YearsRaceHumanProfessionCourt JesterFactionKippernium KingdomStatusAliveResidenceKippernia CastleBackground InformationFirst EpisodeTests and JestsLast EpisodeFor Crying Out LoudVoice ActorMark Rendall Jingle Boy (Dragon) Jester is the court jester. characters.name: King Caradoc Kippernook
characters.description: King Caradoc Kippernook is king of Kippernia. He is married toQueen Gwendolynand has two children:Prince Cuthbert(8) andPrincess Lavinia(6). Gullible and inexperienced, King Caradoc is easily deceived, especially by the merchantMagnus Breech, and prone to excessive spending. Much like a child, he is short-tempered and easily distracted when things don't go his way or don't interest him. The king does possess a certain amount of wisdom, as far as the law is concerned, and enough gravity to tell somebody (mostlyJane) off. King Caradoc dotes on his children who can do no wrong in his eyes; unless he witnesses their wrong-doing himself. "Caradoc" is not the king's real name. In his childhood and youth, the king's name was "Rathbone" and "Caradoc" was his older brother. The real Prince Caradoc died in his adolescence, well before he could ascend the throne. Prince Rathbone, his younger brother, became crown prince and adopted the name "Caradoc" upon ascending the throne.

characters.name: Magnus Breech
characters.description: Magnus Breech is Gunther's father. A wealthy merchant and a shrewd and cunning businessman, he will often lie, cheat and swindle his way to the top. Since he is paying for his son to train as a knight, Magnus pushes Gunther to out-do his rival, Jane, and be the best and will try almost anything himself if his son doesn't succeed on his own. Magnus generally treats others, especially his son, coldly, particularly when they don't meet his high expectations and sometimes even when they do.

characters.name: Pepper
characters.description: Verbena SalterBiographyNicknamesPepper (Friends and family)GenderFemaleAge12 YearsRaceHumanProfessionCookFactionKippernium KingdomStatusAliveResidenceKippernia CastleBackground InformationFirst EpisodeTests and JestsLast EpisodeThe Last DragonslayerVoice ActorSunday MuseMotion-Captured byBan AbdulVerbena "Pepper" Salteris the court cook. She is kind, romantic, and very hard-working, with a pale complexion due to the great amount of time she spends indoors preparing the entire castle's meals. She is very good friends with the rest of the castle staff around her age, with an evident crush onRake. Pepper is a very skilled cook and possesses good marksmanship, even being able to hit Jester from several meters away with her back turned.

characters.name: Pepper
characters.description: Verbena SalterBiographyNicknamesPepper (Friends and family)GenderFemaleAge12 YearsRaceHumanProfessionCookFactionKippernium KingdomStatusAliveResidenceKippernia CastleBackground InformationFirst EpisodeTests and JestsLast EpisodeThe Last DragonslayerVoice ActorSunday MuseMotion-Captured byBan AbdulVerbena "Pepper" Salteris the court cook. characters.name: Princess Lavinia
characters.description: Princess LaviniaBiographyTitlePrincessNicknamesYour Little Majesty (Friends and family)GenderFemaleAge6 YearsRaceHumanFactionKippernium KingdomStatusAliveResidenceKippernia CastleBackground InformationFirst EpisodeTests and JestsLast EpisodeFor Crying Out LoudVoice ActorIsabel De CarteretMotion-Captured byBan Abdul Princess Lavinia Pernilla Kippernookis the youngest member of the castle and is the daughter ofKing CaradocandQueen Gwendolyn. Princess Lavinia is typically shown wearing a tiara and diadem over her black hair, which is slightly messy and hangs in strands over her face. She has brown eyes. Lavinia is always seen wearing a long lavender floral patterned robe, and a pair of toy dragon's wings. Princess Lavinia is a very lively young child. While she has her girly moments, she is typically very tomboyish and enjoys roughhousing, as many children do. She is slightly spoiled by her parents (she tends to very easily get what she wants, being a princess) but in no way does this show in her demeanor and despite growing up with an affluent background, she remains a joy to be around.

characters.name: Queen Gwendolyn
characters.description: Queen GwendolynBiographyTitleQueenNicknamesYour MajestyGenderFemaleAge28 YearsRaceHumanProfessionQueenFactionKippernium KingdomStatusAliveResidenceKippernia CastleBackground InformationFirst EpisodeTests and JestsLast EpisodeFor Crying Out LoudVoice ActorAlex Belcourt Queen Gwendolyn Hulda Kippernook(née Ankarcrona) is the wife ofKing Caradocand the mother ofPrincess LaviniaandPrince Cuthbert. She's the daughter of a noble family from across the North Sea in Scandinavia. Queen Gwendolyn generally behaves in a composed, regal and distant manner but the latter may be due to her missing her homeland. However, she is by no means an unpleasant person: she loves her children very much and briefly takes Jane into her confidence over her hatred of pomp, ceremony and perfection.

characters.name: Rake
characters.description: RakeBiographyNicknamesRake (Friends and family)Gardener (Dragon)Garden Boy (Dragon)Dung Boy (Dragon)GenderMaleAge13 YearsRaceHumanProfessionGardenerFactionKippernium KingdomStatusAliveResidenceKippernia CastleBackground InformationFirst EpisodeTests and JestsLast EpisodeFor Crying Out LoudVoice ActorWill Seatle BowesMotion-Captured byNick BlakeDrake "Rake"is the castle gardener. He is very skilled with plants, and tends the gardens with great care and enthusiasm. Gardener (Dragon)Garden Boy (Dragon)Dung Boy (Dragon)  Rake is a very soft-spoken character, and at times is skittish in the face of adversity, but typically pulls though when his friends need him. He is typically very sweet and good-natured, and at times can become quite silly; especially when around his friends. Gardening is his passion, and he is shown at multiple points during the series to care deeply about his work as the castle gardener. Rake's garden is his own little world. He knows every inch of it backwards and can find any plant in it with his eyes closed.

characters.name: Sir Theodore
characters.description: Sir TheodoreBiographyNicknamesOld Rusty Legs (Dragon)GenderMaleRaceHumanProfessionCaptain of the Royal GuardFactionKippernium KingdomStatusAliveResidenceKippernia CastleBackground InformationFirst EpisodeTests and JestsLast EpisodeFor Crying Out LoudVoice ActorAron TagerMotion-Captured byNick BlakeSir Theodore is the captain of the king's Guard and has lead numerous battles mentioned throughout the series. Jane is his squire and he teaches her how to fight and important lessons that a knight will need in battle. Wise, fair and serious, Sir Theodore acts as a father figure to Jane. Although he may come across as stern and earnest, he does have a kindly and compassionate side and a sense of humour, as shown by his love of All Fool's Day.

characters.name: Sir Theodore
characters.description: Sir TheodoreBiographyNicknamesOld Rusty Legs (Dragon)GenderMaleRaceHumanProfessionCaptain of the Royal GuardFactionKippernium KingdomStatusAliveResidenceKippernia CastleBackground InformationFirst EpisodeTests and JestsLast EpisodeFor Crying Out LoudVoice ActorAron TagerMotion-Captured byNick BlakeSir Theodore is the captain of the king's Guard and has lead numerous battles mentioned throughout the series. characters.name: Smithy
characters.description: Jethro JuniorBiographyNicknamesSmithy (Friends)Junior (Family)Leather Legs (Dragon)Hammer Boy (Dragon)GenderMaleAge15 YearsRaceHumanProfessionBlack SmithFactionKippernium KingdomStatusAliveResidenceKippernia CastleBackground InformationFirst EpisodeTests and JestsLast EpisodeFor Crying Out LoudVoice ActorAlex HouseMotion-Captured byDavid HoskinsJethro "Smithy" Junioris the court blacksmith and squire to all the knights and knights-in-training. He is a soft-spoken, mild-mannered fifteen-year-old with an underlying wit. A genius at the forge, he is smart and good with all tools. He is the most mature of his friends among the castle staff, and is something of an older brother to them all. He is very compassionate and cares deeply for his friends and kingdom, especially Pig, his pig helper. Junior (Family)Leather Legs (Dragon)Hammer Boy (Dragon)
